data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a final settlement audit trail.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for a 'Final settlement audit trail', but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of such an audit trail. The linked use case mentions the need for a final settlement audit trail, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of this functionality being implemented or tested. This indicates a lack of sufficient evidence to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
gaps: Lack of evidence for final settlement audit trail.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
